name: A New Sprout
text: Discover a Tier 1 minion.

name: Enchanted Lasso
text: Steal a random minion from the Tavern.

name: Fortify
text: Give a minion +3 Health and Taunt.

name: Pointy Arrow
text: [x]Give a minion +4 Attack.

name: Recruit a Trainee
text: [x]Get a random Tier 1 minion.

name: Tavern Coin
text: Gain 1 Gold.

name: Tavern Dish Banana
text: Give a minion +2/+2.

name: Them Apples
text: Give minions in the Tavern +1/+2.

name: Chef's Choice
text: Choose a minion. Get a different minion of the same type.

name: Hasty Excavation
text: Gain 1 Gold. This costs Health to buy instead of Gold.

name: Leaf Through the Pages
text: Gain 2 free Refreshes.

name: Search Through Time
text: Discover a minion of your Tier. Lock it in your hand for 1 turn.

name: Strike Oil
text: Increase your maximum Gold by 1.

name: Blood Gem Barrage
text: After the Tavern is Refreshed this game, give its minions +1/+1 worth of Blood Gems.

name: Careful Investment
text: Gain 2 Gold next turn.

name: Fleeting Vigor
text: Start of Combat: Give your minions +2/+1.

name: Haunted Carapace
text: Your minions have +3/+1 until next turn.

name: Mounting Avalanche
text: [x]Sell a friendly minion. Give its stats to your left-most Elemental.

name: Overconfidence
text: If you win your next combat, gain 3 Gold. If you tie, gain 1.

name: Planar Telescope
text: [x]Discover a minion of your most common type.

name: Portal in a Fountain
text: Pass a minion in the Tavern.

name: Robust Evolution
text: Choose a minion. Transform it into a random minion of a higher Tier. It keeps its stats.

name: Shiny Ring
text: Give your minions +1/+1.

name: Time Management
text: [x]Choose One - Give your minions +2/+2; or At the start of your next turn, give your minions +2/+2 twice.

name: Tricky Trousers
text: Give a minion +1/+2 and Taunt. If it already has Taunt, remove it.

name: Cloning Conch
text: Get a random Murloc and a copy of it.

name: Defender's Rites
text: Give a friendly minion +6/+6 and Taunt.

name: Easterly Winds
text: [x]After the Tavern is Refreshed this game, give its right-most minion +5/+5.

name: Gem Confiscation
text: [x]This plays 2 Blood Gems on a minion. It steals all Blood Gems from its neighbors.

name: Misplaced Tea Set
text: Give a friendly minion of each type +2/+2.

name: Natural Blessing
text: Choose a minion. Give all minions that share a type with it +3/+3.

name: Raptor's Revenge
text: [x]Avenge (4): Get a random Beast. Lasts 1 turn.

name: Shifting Tide
text: [x]Give a minion +2/+2 twice. If it's a Naga, repeat this.

name: Spitescale Special
text: Get 3 random Spellcraft spells.

name: Staff of Enrichment
text: Give minions in the Tavern +2/+2 this game.

name: Temperature Shift
text: Get a Fire Baller and a Snow Baller.

name: Tomb Turning
text: [x]Discover an Undead. It dies if you play it this turn.

name: Armor Stash
text: Set your Armor to 5.

name: Bargain Bundle
text: Discover a minion. Your teammate gets the other options.

name: Brood of Nozdormu
text: Start of Combat: Double your left-most minion's Attack.

name: Channel the Devourer
text: Sell a friendly minion. Give its stats to a random friendly minion.

name: Contracted Corpse
text: Discover a Deathrattle minion.

name: Corrupted Cupcakes
text: Choose a friendly Demon. It consumes 3 random minions in the Tavern to gain their stats.

name: Golden Touch
text: Make a random minion in the Tavern Golden.

name: Hired Headhunter
text: Discover a Battlecry minion.

name: Portal in a Crystal
text: Pass a friendly non-Golden minion.

name: Saloon's Finest
text: Refresh the Tavern with Tavern spells.

name: Sanctify
text: [x]Give your minions with Divine Shield +6 Attack.

name: Unmasked Identity
text: Discover a new Hero Power.

name: Upper Hand
text: Start of Combat: Set a random enemy minion's Health to 1.

name: Wave of Gold
text: Give your minions +3/+2. Give Golden ones another +3/+2.

name: Azerite Empowerment
text: Give your minions +2/+2 twice.

name: Eyes of the Earth Mother
text: Choose a friendly minion from Tier 4 or below. Make it Golden.

name: Hand of Deios
text: Start of Combat: Trigger a random friendly Battlecry, Deathrattle, and Rally.

name: Lost Staff of Hamuul
text: [x]Choose a minion. Refresh the Tavern with minions of its type.

name: Perfect Vision
text: Set a minion's stats to 20/20.

name: Blade of Ambition
text: Choose a friendly minion. Set its Attack and Health to match the highest in your warband.

name: Hallowed Ritual
text: Discover a Tier 7 minion.

name: Sacred Gift
text: Give a minion Divine Shield.

name: Sharing is Caring
text: Start of Combat: Your left-most minion gains stats equal to the nearest enemy minion's.
